title: Reported Speech
description: Report what colleagues said in meetings. Summarize discussions using reported speech with tense backshift and reporting verbs.
descriptionTr: Toplantılarda meslektaşların ne dediğini aktar. Zaman geri kayması ve aktarma fiilleri ile tartışmaları özetle.

vocabulary.example: She reported that the shipment was delayed.
vocabulary.extra: The manager reported the results to the board.

vocabulary.example: He mentioned that the deadline had changed.
vocabulary.extra: Did anyone mention the budget issue?

vocabulary.example: She explained that the delay was caused by customs.
vocabulary.extra: Can you explain why the order was late?
vocabulary.extraTr: Siparişin neden geç kaldığını açıklayabilir misin?

vocabulary.example: The CEO announced that the company would expand.
vocabulary.extra: They announced the new policy at the meeting.

vocabulary.example: He suggested that we hire more drivers.
vocabulary.extra: She suggested changing the delivery route.

vocabulary.example: The director proposed a new shipping strategy.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Direktör yeni bir sevkiyat stratejisi teklif etti.
vocabulary.extra: He proposed that we extend the deadline.

vocabulary.example: Everyone agreed that the plan was good.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Herkes planın iyi olduğu konusunda hemfikirdi.
vocabulary.extra: She agreed to send the report by Friday.
vocabulary.extraTr: Raporu Cuma gününe kadar göndermeyi kabul etti.

vocabulary.example: He disagreed with the proposed timeline.
vocabulary.extra: Two managers disagreed about the budget.

vocabulary.example: She confirmed that the order had been shipped.
vocabulary.extra: Can you confirm the delivery date?

vocabulary.example: He denied that there was a problem with the system.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sistemde bir sorun olduğunu inkar etti.
vocabulary.extra: The supplier denied responsibility for the damage.

vocabulary.example: She warned us that the costs would increase.
vocabulary.extra: The manager warned the team about the deadline.
vocabulary.extraTr: Müdür ekibi son tarih hakkında uyardı.

vocabulary.example: He promised that the issue would be resolved.
vocabulary.extra: They promised to deliver by Monday.
vocabulary.extraTr: Pazartesi gününe kadar teslim edeceklerine söz verdiler.

vocabulary.example: The client complained that deliveries were always late.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Müşteri teslimatların hep geç olduğundan şikayet etti.
vocabulary.extra: Several customers complained about the packaging.

vocabulary.example: She reminded us that the report was due tomorrow.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Raporun yarın teslim edilmesi gerektiğini hatırlattı.
vocabulary.extra: He reminded the team about the safety rules.

vocabulary.example: He informed us that the warehouse would be closed.
vocabulary.extra: Please inform the client about the delay.

vocabulary.example: The report stated that sales had dropped by 15%.
vocabulary.extra: He clearly stated his position on the issue.

vocabulary.example: The supplier claimed that the goods were shipped on time.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tedarikçi malların zamanında sevk edildiğini iddia etti.
vocabulary.extra: She claimed that the invoice was incorrect.

vocabulary.example: He insisted that the meeting should start at 9 AM.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Toplantının sabah 9'da başlaması gerektiğinde ısrar etti.
vocabulary.extra: The client insisted on a full refund.
vocabulary.extraTr: Müşteri tam iade konusunda ısrar etti.

vocabulary.example: She admitted that the error was on their side.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Hatanın kendi taraflarında olduğunu kabul etti.
vocabulary.extra: He admitted making a mistake in the report.

vocabulary.example: The client requested that we send a revised invoice.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Müşteri düzeltilmiş bir fatura göndermemizi talep etti.
vocabulary.extra: She requested more time to complete the project.
vocabulary.extraTr: Projeyi tamamlamak için daha fazla zaman talep etti.

vocabulary.example: The customer demanded a full refund immediately.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Müşteri derhal tam iade talep etti.
vocabulary.extra: They demanded that we replace all defective items.
vocabulary.extraTr: Tüm kusurlu ürünleri değiştirmemizi talep ettiler.

vocabulary.example: She recommended that we switch to a new carrier.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yeni bir taşıyıcıya geçmemizi tavsiye etti.
vocabulary.extra: The consultant recommended reducing overhead costs.
vocabulary.extraTr: Danışman genel giderleri düşürmeyi tavsiye etti.

vocabulary.example: He concluded that the project was behind schedule.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Projenin programın gerisinde kaldığı sonucuna vardı.
vocabulary.extra: The meeting concluded with a vote on the proposal.
vocabulary.extraTr: Toplantı teklif üzerine oylama ile sonuçlandı.

vocabulary.example: Can you summarize what was discussed in the meeting?
vocabulary.extra: She summarized the key points for the team.

vocabulary.example: He emphasized that quality was the top priority.
vocabulary.extra: The director emphasized the importance of deadlines.

vocabulary.example: She pointed out that the data was outdated.
vocabulary.extra: He pointed out a mistake in the report.

vocabulary.example: He responded that they would look into it.
vocabulary.extra: She responded quickly to the customer's email.

vocabulary.example: He argued that the budget was too low.
vocabulary.extra: They argued about the best delivery method.
vocabulary.extraTr: En iyi teslimat yöntemi hakkında tartıştılar.

vocabulary.example: She clarified that the deadline was Friday, not Thursday.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Son tarihin Perşembe değil Cuma olduğunu açıklığa kavuşturdu.
vocabulary.extra: Could you clarify what you meant by that?
vocabulary.extraTr: Bununla ne demek istediğinizi açıklığa kavuşturabilir misiniz?

vocabulary.example: The manager highlighted the need for better communication.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Müdür daha iyi iletişim ihtiyacını vurguladı.
vocabulary.extra: She highlighted three key risks in the project.
vocabulary.extraTr: Projedeki üç temel riski öne çıkardı.

grammar.title: Reported Speech — Tense Backshift & Reporting Verbs
grammar.titleTr: Dolaylı Anlatım — Zaman Geri Kayması ve Aktarma Fiilleri
grammar.explanation: When we report what someone said, we usually shift the tense back. Direct: 'I will send it.' → Reported: He said (that) he would send it. We use reporting verbs like said, told, asked, explained, suggested to introduce what was said.
grammar.explanationTr: Birinin ne dediğini aktarırken, genellikle zamanı bir adım geri kaydırırız. Doğrudan: 'Göndereceğim.' → Dolaylı: Göndereceğini söyledi. Söyleneni aktarmak için said, told, asked, explained, suggested gibi aktarma fiilleri kullanırız.
table: He said (that) he worked in logistics.
She said (that) they were preparing the report.
He said (that) he had sent the invoice.
She said (that) she would fix the problem.
He said (that) they could deliver by Friday.
"Cuma'ya kadar teslim edebiliriz." → Cuma'ya kadar teslim edebileceklerini söyledi.
She said (that) I had to submit the form.
"Formu teslim etmelisin." → Formu teslim etmem gerektiğini söyledi.
He asked where the shipment was.

tips.en: 'said' = general reporting. 'told' always needs an object: He told ME that... (not 'He told that...')
tips.tr: 'said' = genel aktarma. 'told' her zaman nesne ister: He told ME that... ('He told that...' YANLIŞ)

tips.en: 'that' is optional: 'He said he was busy' = 'He said that he was busy' — both are correct
tips.tr: 'that' isteğe bağlıdır: 'He said he was busy' = 'He said that he was busy' — ikisi de doğru

tips.en: For yes/no questions, use 'if' or 'whether': She asked if we had finished. (NOT 'She asked did we finish.')
tips.tr: Evet/hayır soruları için 'if' veya 'whether' kullan: She asked if we had finished. ('She asked did we finish.' YANLIŞ)

tips.en: Suggest/recommend + gerund or that-clause: He suggested hiring more people. OR He suggested that we hire more people.
tips.tr: Suggest/recommend + fiil-ing veya that-cümle: He suggested hiring more people. VEYA He suggested that we hire more people.

tips.en: Time/place words also change: today→that day, tomorrow→the next day, here→there, this→that
tips.tr: Zaman/yer kelimeleri de değişir: today→that day, tomorrow→the next day, here→there, this→that

tips.en: Don't backshift if the information is still true: 'She said the office is on the 5th floor.' (still true = no change needed)
tips.tr: Bilgi hala doğruysa geri kayma yapma: 'She said the office is on the 5th floor.' (hala doğru = değişiklik gerekmez)

reading.text:
MEETING MINUTES — Logistics Team Weekly Meeting
Date: Monday, October 14
Attendees: Mr. Kaya (Operations Manager), Ms. Demir (Supply Chain Lead), Mr. Harris (Warehouse Supervisor), Ms. Yılmaz (Customer Relations)

Mr. Kaya opened the meeting and announced that Q4 shipment volumes had increased by 25% compared to last year. He warned that the current warehouse capacity might not be enough to handle the peak season.

Ms. Demir reported that three major suppliers had delayed their deliveries by an average of five days. She explained that port congestion in Rotterdam was the main cause. She recommended that the team consider alternative shipping routes through Hamburg.

Mr. Harris complained that the warehouse was already operating at 90% capacity. He pointed out that overtime hours had increased by 40% in September. He requested additional temporary staff for November and December.

Ms. Yılmaz informed the group that customer complaints about late deliveries had doubled since August. She emphasized that response time needed to improve. She suggested creating a dedicated task force to handle Q4 delays.

Mr. Kaya concluded the meeting by stating that he would present a revised logistics plan to senior management by Friday. He reminded everyone to submit their departmental reports by Wednesday.
reading.textTr:
TOPLANTI TUTANAĞI — Lojistik Ekibi Haftalık Toplantısı
Tarih: Pazartesi, 14 Ekim
Katılımcılar: Bay Kaya (Operasyon Müdürü), Bayan Demir (Tedarik Zinciri Sorumlusu), Bay Harris (Depo Süpervizörü), Bayan Yılmaz (Müşteri İlişkileri)

Bay Kaya toplantıyı açtı ve Q4 sevkiyat hacimlerinin geçen yıla göre %25 arttığını duyurdu. Mevcut depo kapasitesinin yoğun sezonu karşılamaya yetmeyebileceği konusunda uyardı.

Bayan Demir üç büyük tedarikçinin teslimatlarını ortalama beş gün geciktirdiğini bildirdi. Rotterdam limanındaki tıkanıklığın ana neden olduğunu açıkladı. Ekibin Hamburg üzerinden alternatif sevkiyat rotalarını değerlendirmesini tavsiye etti.

Bay Harris deponun zaten %90 kapasiteyle çalıştığından şikayet etti. Eylül ayında fazla mesai saatlerinin %40 arttığına dikkat çekti. Kasım ve Aralık için ek geçici personel talep etti.

Bayan Yılmaz gruba Ağustos'tan bu yana geç teslimatlarla ilgili müşteri şikayetlerinin iki katına çıktığını bildirdi. Yanıt süresinin iyileştirilmesi gerektiğini vurguladı. Q4 gecikmelerini ele almak için özel bir görev gücü oluşturulmasını önerdi.

Bay Kaya, Cuma gününe kadar üst yönetime revize edilmiş bir lojistik planı sunacağını belirterek toplantıyı kapattı. Herkese departman raporlarını Çarşamba gününe kadar teslim etmesini hatırlattı.

questions.question: By how much did Q4 shipment volumes increase?
questions.questionTr: Q4 sevkiyat hacimleri ne kadar arttı?

questions.question: What caused the supplier delays according to Ms. Demir?
questions.questionTr: Bayan Demir'e göre tedarikçi gecikmelerinin nedeni neydi?

questions.question: What did Mr. Harris request for November and December?
questions.questionTr: Bay Harris Kasım ve Aralık için ne talep etti?

questions.question: When did Mr. Kaya say he would present the revised plan?
questions.questionTr: Bay Kaya revize planı ne zaman sunacağını söyledi?

fillBlanks.sentence: She said that she ___ working on the report.
He told me that he ___ send the invoice the next day.
She said that they ___ deliver by Friday.
He ___ that the project was behind schedule.
She ___ us that the deadline had changed.
The manager ___ that we hire more staff.
He ___ that there was no problem with the system.
She asked ___ we had finished the report.
He ___ that he had sent the email already.
The director ___ the importance of meeting deadlines.
She ___ out that the data was outdated.
He ___ to fix the problem by Monday.

multipleChoice.question: Direct: "I work in logistics." → Reported?
options: He said he work in logistics.
He said he works in logistics.
He said he worked in logistics.
He said he working in logistics.

multipleChoice.question: Direct: "We will ship tomorrow." → Reported?
options: They said they will ship tomorrow.
They said they would ship the next day.
They said they would ship tomorrow.
They said they shipped the next day.

multipleChoice.question: "She ___ me that the meeting was canceled." Doğru olan?
Direct: "Can you help me?" → Reported?
options: She asked can I help her.
She asked if I could help her.
She asked if I can help her.
She asked could I help her.

multipleChoice.question: Direct: "I sent the invoice." → Reported?
options: He said he sent the invoice.
He said he had sent the invoice.
He said he sends the invoice.
He said he has sent the invoice.

multipleChoice.question: "He ___ that the budget was too low." (savundu)
Hangisi doğru reported speech?
options: She asked where was the office.
She asked where the office was.
She asked where is the office.
She asked where the office is was.

multipleChoice.question: "He told that he was busy." Bu cümle neden yanlış?

sentenceOrder.correct: He said that he was busy
She told me that the meeting had been canceled
He asked if we could finish early
She mentioned that the deadline had changed
The manager suggested hiring more staff
He warned us that costs would increase
She promised to send the report by Friday
He explained that the delay was caused by customs
She recommended that we change the route

translation.english: He said that the meeting had been canceled.
acceptAlso: He said the meeting had been canceled
He said that the meeting was canceled

translation.english: She told me that she would send the order.
acceptAlso: She told me she would send the order

translation.english: He asked where the shipment was.
acceptAlso: He asked where the shipment is

translation.english: She suggested that we hire more staff.

translation.turkish: Sorunu Pazartesi'ye kadar çözeceğine söz verdi.
translation.english: He promised to fix the problem by Monday.
acceptAlso: He promised that he would fix the problem by Monday

translation.english: She explained that the delay was caused by customs.
acceptAlso: She explained that the delay had been caused by customs

translation.english: He argued that the budget was too low.
acceptAlso: He argued the budget was too low

translation.english: She pointed out that customer complaints had increased.
acceptAlso: She pointed out that customer complaints increased

dialog.title: Summarizing the Meeting for a Colleague
dialog.context: Eyüp, lojistik ekibindeki haftalık toplantıya katıldı. Meslektaşı Ayşe toplantıyı kaçırdı. Eyüp öğle yemeğinde Ayşe'ye toplantıda neler konuşulduğunu anlatıyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hey Eyüp, I missed the meeting this morning. What did I miss?
lines.textTr: Hey Eyüp, bu sabah toplantıyı kaçırdım. Neler kaçırdım?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: A lot, actually. Mr. Kaya opened the meeting and announced that Q4 shipment volumes had increased by 25%.
lines.textTr: Aslında çok şey. Bay Kaya toplantıyı açtı ve Q4 sevkiyat hacimlerinin %25 arttığını duyurdu.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Wow, that's a big jump. Did he say anything about the warehouse?
lines.textTr: Vay, büyük bir artış. Depo hakkında bir şey söyledi mi?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes. He warned that the current warehouse capacity might not be enough for the peak season.
lines.textTr: Evet. Mevcut depo kapasitesinin yoğun sezon için yetmeyebileceği konusunda uyardı.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's concerning. What about the supplier delays? Did Ms. Demir mention anything?
lines.textTr: Bu endişe verici. Tedarikçi gecikmeleri ne oldu? Bayan Demir bir şey söyledi mi?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: She reported that three major suppliers had delayed deliveries by about five days. She explained that port congestion in Rotterdam was the main cause.
lines.textTr: Üç büyük tedarikçinin teslimatları yaklaşık beş gün geciktirdiğini bildirdi. Rotterdam limanındaki tıkanıklığın ana neden olduğunu açıkladı.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Did she suggest any solutions?
lines.textTr: Herhangi bir çözüm önerdi mi?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: She recommended that we consider alternative shipping routes through Hamburg instead of Rotterdam.
lines.textTr: Rotterdam yerine Hamburg üzerinden alternatif sevkiyat rotalarını değerlendirmemizi tavsiye etti.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Makes sense. And what about Mr. Harris? He's always worried about the warehouse.
lines.textTr: Mantıklı. Peki Bay Harris? O hep depo için endişelenir.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: He complained that the warehouse was already at 90% capacity. He pointed out that overtime hours had gone up by 40% in September.
lines.textTr: Deponun zaten %90 kapasiteyle çalıştığından şikayet etti. Eylül ayında fazla mesai saatlerinin %40 arttığına dikkat çekti.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Did he request extra help?
lines.textTr: Ek yardım talep etti mi?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, he requested additional temporary staff for November and December. And Mr. Kaya agreed that it was necessary.
lines.textTr: Evet, Kasım ve Aralık için ek geçici personel talep etti. Ve Bay Kaya bunun gerekli olduğunu kabul etti.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good. Did Ms. Yılmaz talk about the customer complaints?
lines.textTr: İyi. Bayan Yılmaz müşteri şikayetlerinden bahsetti mi?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: She informed the group that customer complaints about late deliveries had doubled since August. She emphasized that our response time needed to improve.
lines.textTr: Gruba Ağustos'tan bu yana geç teslimat şikayetlerinin iki katına çıktığını bildirdi. Yanıt süremizin iyileştirilmesi gerektiğini vurguladı.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's not good at all. Did she propose anything?
lines.textTr: Bu hiç iyi değil. Bir şey önerdi mi?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: She suggested creating a dedicated task force to handle Q4 delays. Everyone seemed to agree.
lines.textTr: Q4 gecikmelerini ele almak için özel bir görev gücü oluşturulmasını önerdi. Herkes aynı fikirde görünüyordu.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: So how did the meeting end? Any deadlines we should know about?
lines.textTr: Peki toplantı nasıl bitti? Bilmemiz gereken son tarihler var mı?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Mr. Kaya concluded by stating that he would present a revised logistics plan to senior management by Friday. And he reminded everyone to submit their departmental reports by Wednesday.
lines.textTr: Bay Kaya, Cuma gününe kadar üst yönetime revize bir lojistik planı sunacağını belirterek toplantıyı kapattı. Ve herkese departman raporlarını Çarşamba'ya kadar teslim etmesini hatırlattı.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Wednesday — got it. Thanks for the summary, Eyüp. You explained everything really clearly.
lines.textTr: Çarşamba — anlaşıldı. Özet için teşekkürler Eyüp. Her şeyi çok net açıkladın.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: No problem. I'll send you the meeting minutes by email so you have all the details.
lines.textTr: Sorun değil. Tüm detaylara sahip olman için toplantı tutanaklarını e-postayla göndereceğim.

questions.question: Why did Ayşe need a summary?
options: She was in a different meeting

questions.question: What did Mr. Kaya announce at the start?
What solution did Ms. Demir recommend?
questions.questionTr: Bayan Demir hangi çözümü tavsiye etti?

questions.question: What did Ms. Yılmaz suggest?
options: Creating a task force for Q4 delays

questions.question: By when must departmental reports be submitted?
questions.questionTr: Departman raporları ne zamana kadar teslim edilmeli?

resources.title: Reported Speech Exercises — Perfect English Grammar
